title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. gracilescens
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. gracilescens, also known as Yellow Buttons, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. gracilescens include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. gracilescens can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
